title: Farmer's Cutting: Eternal Starlight
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Eternal Starlight
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Eternal Starlight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eternal-starlight)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all (applicable) wood types
- More dye from flora that give dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PuIiD6eS/images/282d0eff09273e0cbdb65204bd7d8987903d060e.png) ![Flower Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PuIiD6eS/images/b012668625c66f65e0b40f447293b9d7258de8c0.png)
